appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the verified pairing-security setup commands, concurrency limits, and flow-validator isolation guidance for Flutter widget tests and the live bridge/Tailscale surface.
Documented that pairing expired-QR coverage currently lives in pairing_qr_validator_test.dart while the other pairing user-surface flows are covered in pairing_flow_test.dart.

notes: Spawned three user-testing flow validators covering desktop QR/private-route checks, mobile pairing widget flows, and trust persistence/single-phone enforcement.

Live bridge setup on 2026-03-18 reported pairing_route.reachable=true with advertised_base_url=https://macbook-pro.taild54ede.ts.net, and tailscale serve status mapped that MagicDNS host to http://127.0.0.1:3110.
Pairing user-surface validation used targeted xcodebuild, flutter test, cargo test, curl, and tailscale commands with evidence captured under the mission evidence directory.
